assertions.description: navigator.gpu is available for WebGPU access.
A WGSL shader using subgroup operations (subgroupBallot, subgroupElect) compiles without error.
assertions.test: (()=>{if(!navigator.gpu)return false;return navigator.gpu.requestAdapter({}).then(async a=>{if(!a)return false;const d=await a.requestDevice();try{const m=d.createShaderModule({code:'diagnostic(off);\ndiagnostic(unrecognized_derivative_in_compute);\n@compute @workgroup_size(64) fn main(@builtin(subgroup_invocation_id) id: u32){var b=subgroupBallot(true);}'});const ci=await m.getCompilationInfo();return ci.messages.filter(m=>m.type==='error').length===0}catch(e){return false}}).catch(()=>false)})()

assertions.description: The WGSL subgroup_size builtin is accessible in compute shaders.
assertions.test: (()=>{if(!navigator.gpu)return false;return navigator.gpu.requestAdapter({}).then(async a=>{if(!a)return false;const d=await a.requestDevice();try{const m=d.createShaderModule({code:'diagnostic(off);\n@group(0) @binding(0) var<storage,read_write> out: array<u32>;\n@compute @workgroup_size(64) fn main(@builtin(subgroup_invocation_id) id: u32, @builtin(subgroup_size) sz: u32){if(id==0u){out[0]=sz;}}'});const ci=await m.getCompilationInfo();return ci.messages.filter(m=>m.type==='error').length===0}catch(e){return false}}).catch(()=>false)})()

assertions.description: GPUComputePipelineDescriptor accepts a subgroupSize hint in the pipeline layout.
assertions.test: (()=>{if(!navigator.gpu)return false;return navigator.gpu.requestAdapter({}).then(async a=>{if(!a)return false;const d=await a.requestDevice();try{const m=d.createShaderModule({code:'diagnostic(off);\n@compute @workgroup_size(64) fn main(@builtin(subgroup_invocation_id) id: u32){var b=subgroupBallot(true);}'});const p=d.createComputePipeline({layout:'auto',compute:{module:m,entryPoint:'main',constants:{}}});return p instanceof GPUComputePipeline}catch(e){return false}}).catch(()=>false)})()
